settings.title: Overview
settings.content:
At SheyeOladejo, your privacy is treated with the same care as our craftsmanship. This policy outlines how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you interact with our website and services.
By using our platform, you consent to the collection and use of your information as outlined below.

settings.title: Information We Collect
settings.content: We collect only what is necessary to serve you with clarity and precision.

settings.title: Information You Provide
settings.content:
Name
Email address
Phone number
Billing and delivery address
Order and measurement details (for custom pieces)

settings.title: Automatically Collected Information
settings.content:
When you browse our website, we may collect:
Device type, browser, and IP address
Pages viewed and interactions
Location and usage data
This helps us improve performance, security, and your experience.

settings.title: How We Use Your Information
settings.content:
Your information is used to deliver a seamless and considered experience:
To process and fulfill orders
To communicate with you about your purchases
To provide client support
To improve our website and services
To send relevant updates, collections, and offers (where consent is given)
We may also use data to prevent fraud and ensure platform security.

settings.title: Sharing of Information
settings.content:
We do not sell your personal information.
Your data may be shared only where necessary with:
Payment processors
Delivery partners
Service providers supporting our operations
Information may also be disclosed where required by law or to protect the Brand.

settings.title: Cookies & Tracking
settings.content:
We use cookies and similar technologies to:
Enhance your browsing experience
Understand site usage
Personalize content and offers
You may disable cookies through your browser settings, though this may affect site functionality.

settings.title: Data Retention
settings.content:
Your information is retained only for as long as necessary to:
Fulfill orders
Maintain records
Comply with legal obligations
When no longer required, your data is securely deleted or anonymized.

settings.title: Data Security
settings.content:
We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your information.
This includes secure systems and encryption protocols where applicable.
While we take every precaution, no system is entirely immune to risk.

settings.title: Your Rights
settings.content:
Under applicable data protection laws, you have the right to:
Access your personal data
Request corrections
Request deletion of your data
Withdraw consent for marketing communications
Object to certain types of data processing
Requests will be handled promptly and in accordance with legal requirements.

settings.title: International Data Transfers
settings.content:
As a global brand, your data may be processed outside your country of residence.
Where this occurs, appropriate safeguards are applied to ensure your information remains protected.

settings.title: Third-Party Links
settings.content:
Our website may contain links to external platforms.
We are not responsible for the privacy practices of third-party websites and encourage you to review their policies separately.

settings.title: Updates to This Policy
settings.content:
This policy may be updated periodically to reflect changes in our operations or legal requirements.
Continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of any updates.
